name: Frappe Gantt

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need an interactive Gantt chart with task intervals, progress, dependency arrows, and day/week/month views instead of hand-written SVG, which fails at time scales, dependency routing, drag geometry, and cross-scale views. Do not use it for an ordinary point-event timeline or a static list of only a few items.
en.why_valuable: AI can usually produce only about 60% of a static Mermaid Gantt chart and cannot deliver reliable dependency arrows, draggable task bars and progress handles, date scales, or multiple view modes. Frappe Gantt adds these capabilities through a shallow tasks array.

data_in.note: Pass tasks directly to the native new Gantt(element, tasks, options). start/end use YYYY-MM-DD or date-time strings; upstream treats an end before start or a span over ten years as invalid. Callbacks are excluded below; the consuming AI must connect uplink for post-interaction state.

tasks.id: string -- unique and without spaces; dependencies references this value
tasks.name: string
tasks.dependencies?: string | string[] -- prerequisite task ids; comma-separate a string; defaults to []
tasks.description?: string -- rendered only with a custom popup option; the default popup does not show it
tasks.custom_class?: string -- task-bar CSS class; unset by default

schema.empty_text?: string -- displayed by boot when tasks is empty; defaults to '暂无任务'

spec.note: The Gantt table and geometry must receive an explicit pixel height before initialization. The default is 400px and AI may override it. boot sets both the container height and upstream container_height; vh and percentage heights are forbidden by iron rule 3.

when_to_use: 需要任务区间、完成度、依赖箭头与日/周/月视图的交互甘特图时用它而非手写 SVG,因为原生在时间刻度、依赖布线、拖动几何和跨尺度视图上失败;非做普通点事件时间轴或仅展示三五项的静态清单。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能写约 60% 的静态 Mermaid 甘特,做不到可靠的依赖箭头、可拖任务条/进度柄、日期刻度与多视图切换;Frappe Gantt 用浅 tasks 数组补齐这些能力。

data_in.note: tasks 直接传给原生 new Gantt(element, tasks, options);start/end 使用 YYYY-MM-DD 或含时间的日期字符串,end 早于 start 或跨度超过十年会被上游判无效。下面不收回调,交互后的上行由消费 AI 自己接。

tasks.id: string —— 唯一且不要含空格;dependencies 引用此值
tasks.name: string
tasks.dependencies?: string | string[] —— 前置任务 id,字符串用逗号分隔;默认 []
tasks.description?: string —— 需自定义 popup option 才渲染;默认 popup 不显示
tasks.custom_class?: string —— 任务条 CSS class,默认不设置

schema.empty_text?: string —— tasks 为空时由 boot 显示,默认 '暂无任务'

spec.note: 甘特表格/几何布局必须在初始化前获得明确像素高度;默认 400px,AI 可覆盖。boot 同时设置容器 height 与上游 container_height,禁用 vh/百分比高(铁律 3)。

example._why: 甘特图的日期区间、依赖 id 与视图选项组合有歧义,minimal example 用原生 tasks/options 形状消歧。

uplink: display/local-interact 类,默认无需上行。若要回传改期或进度,由消费 AI 直接接 Frappe Gantt 原生回调并按载体分支;本条不规定统一事件出口。

carriers.widget: conditional:须把 frappe-gantt.css 与容器一并落入 shadowRoot;构造器直接接收 HTMLElement,SVG、popup 与交互 DOM 均留在该容器内
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + 外部 CSS + SVG/DOM,无 worker/wasm 或默认上行依赖

owner_note: pick 合并三个场景;本条以 data-explore 为 owner,交互共创与浏览比较复用同一原生组件。

isolation.evidence: Source: the popup renders into a popup_wrapper appended to the gantt container (no document.body); the library does not auto-inject CSS — frappe-gantt.css is placed by the boot (in shadowRoot for widget). It registers one persistent document.addEventListener('mouseup', …) for bar/progress drag-release with no destroy/cleanup path; that listener still fires cross-shadow (mouseup bubbles to document), so it works but is a standing global footprint. Shadow use is conditional on placing the CSS inside the shadow root.
